case_title: TAT KONG CHEUNG et al VS. MATTHEW WAYNE GORDILLO

docket_entries.description: DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHEUNG, TAT KONG CHOW, KWAI YING AS TO DEFENDANT GORDILLO, MATTHEW WAYNE
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-30-2008 IS OFF CALENDAR, NO APPEARANCE(S). NO APPEARANCE BY EITHER PARTY. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID LAVINE. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
SC-105: REQUEST FOR COURT ORDER AND ANSWER FILED AND RECEIVED. COPY OF THE SAME WITH "ANSWER" FORM MAILED TO PLAINTIFFS. FILED BY DEFENDANT GORDILLO, MATTHEW WAYNE

ORDER ON REQUEST TO CORRECT OR CANCEL JUDGMENT. "DEFENDANT'S REQUEST WILL BE HEARD AS A CHALLENGE TO VENUE AT THE TIME PREVIOUSLY SET FOR TRIAL. DEFENDANT NEED NOT APPEAR AT HEARING", PER COMMISSIONER PAUL SLAVIT. COPY MAILED TO PARTIES.
